text.title: ads-conversion-tracking Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ads-conversion-tracking as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: iOS 14.5+ ATT, Safari ITP, and EU consent banners cut browser-only pixel coverage by 30-60% — server-side is mandatory for accurate numbers.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Browser privacy features are beyond an advertiser's control. Browser-only tracking is inherently incomplete in 2026; CAPI is the only path to ground truth.

failure-mode.description: Meta CAPI events without event_id get deduped against the pixel by event_name + timestamp window — easy to double-count if you skip event IDs.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Meta's fallback deduplication is imprecise. Events with the same name fired within seconds can appear different. Event IDs prevent this false-positive dedup.

failure-mode.description: predicted_ltv on Meta is a custom param Meta doesn't actually use for bidding (yet) — don't optimize on it.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Meta's documentation promises LTV-aware bidding but has not shipped it. Agents that instrument predicted_ltv are building for a future that may not arrive; focus on actual conversion signals instead.

failure-mode.description: LinkedIn Insight Tag has 90-day attribution but only fires on direct site visits — single-page apps need explicit _linkedin_partner_id push on route change.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LinkedIn's tag is not universal; SPAs must hook route changes manually. Agents deploying LinkedIn without SPA-specific handling will get zero conversions.

failure-mode.description: gtag/GTM server containers don't replicate Meta's automatic advanced matching — you must hash and send PII fields explicitly.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Advanced matching requires PII; GTM's server container defaults to anonymous tracking. Agents must explicitly include PII hashing to enable matching.

failure-mode.description: Apple's Private Relay strips IP from server-side requests for some users — fingerprinting fallbacks degrade silently.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: When IP is unavailable, match rates drop sharply. Agents are blind to the failure because no error is raised — the event lands but with zero match rate.
